name: Medallion Metals Limited.
analysis: It is coming off a base, 24% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.4550, stop A$0.3688, target A$0.5450 (1.04:1) — then trail it.
